settings.title: Designer
settings.content: A handmade pottery vase with a bold brick-red finish. Crafted by skilled artisans, the piece features an organic silhouette and a raw, textured surface that nods to wabi-sabi design.

settings.title: Materials
settings.content: Stoneware clay, hand-thrown and finished with a matte reactive glaze. Small variations in tone and texture are inherent to the making.

settings.title: Care
settings.content: Wipe gently with a soft, dry cloth. Avoid harsh cleaners, abrasive sponges, or prolonged exposure to water. For decorative use, we recommend a watertight liner or vessel before adding water.

settings.caption: Use on your nightstand. Pairs well with a big white flower. Cut stems to around 6" and add around 5-6 large flowers.
Group with objects of different heights for an easy, collected tablescape.
Let it stand alone on a shelf — the silhouette is the statement.
